title: From UPI to cards, India’s payment choices are becoming more purposeful
content:
India offers a wide array of payment options, ranging from digital methods like UPI to traditional cards.
*   Consumers are increasingly making deliberate and strategic choices about which payment method to use.
*   This signifies a shift towards selecting the most suitable payment tool for specific transaction needs or situations.

title: Isro arm raises satellite bandwidth rates 20% after a decade
content:
ISRO's commercial arm has increased rates for satellite bandwidth services.
*   The rate hike amounts to 20%.
*   This is the first such increase in a decade.

title: MobiKwik Group receives NBFC license from RBI
content:
MobiKwik Group has been granted an NBFC (Non-Banking Financial Company) license.
*   The license was issued by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
*   This official approval allows MobiKwik to operate as a regulated financial services provider.

title: RBI tightens bad loan rules to align with global norms
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has made its rules concerning bad loans more stringent.
*   This tightening is aimed at aligning India's banking regulations with global best practices.
*   The move implies a stricter approach to how banks manage and classify non-performing assets.

title: SEBI urged to probe alleged ₹275 crore fund diversion in slum rehab project by listed firm
content:
SEBI has been urged to launch an investigation.
*   The probe concerns an alleged diversion of ₹275 crore in funds.
*   This alleged fund diversion was carried out by a listed firm within a slum rehabilitation project.

title: The cost of bringing down inflation in India, U.S. and U.K. | Data
content:
Examines the economic costs and sacrifices required to bring down inflation.
*   Specifically analyzes the situations in India, the United States, and the United Kingdom.
*   Presents supporting data and insights to illustrate these national efforts and their impact.

title: One businessman, two attorneys involved in multimillion-dollar Hawaii bribery scheme
content:
A businessman and two attorneys are implicated in a scheme.
*   The individuals are involved in a bribery operation.
*   The alleged bribery is valued in the multimillion-dollar range and occurred in Hawaii.

title: Assembly election 2026 LIVE: All preparations done for second phase of West Bengal polls, says Election Commission
content:
Assembly elections are currently underway in West Bengal.
*   The Election Commission has announced that all preparations for the second phase of polling are complete.
*   This update is part of the ongoing live coverage of the elections.

title: U.S. Pacific Air Forces chief’s visit to India cements defence ties
content:
The chief of the U.S. Pacific Air Forces visited India.
*   The visit's primary objective was to strengthen and solidify defense ties between the two nations.
*   This engagement signifies a growing strategic military partnership between the U.S. and India.

title: Government signs MoU with State Legal Services Authority to promote legal awareness and child protection in schools
content:
The Government has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the State Legal Services Authority.
*   The primary objective of this agreement is to promote legal awareness.
*   It also aims to enhance child protection initiatives within schools.
